candidate.name: fused_full_dq_local_dkv_plus_compressed_union_dkv
candidate.contract: One query-major branch computes dQ over all local+compressed selected keys and emits dKV only for the local window; a second branch computes compressed-union dKV.

decision.reason: Fusing local-window dKV into the full-index dQ branch removes a launch but does not remove enough source-boundary work. Under event overlap, both branches still inflate and the measured makespan remains 12.28 ms versus the 11.13 ms gate.
decision.next_kernel_direction: Move beyond split launches: build a shared producer/cooperative owner where QK, dO.V, softmax terms, dQ, local dKV, and compressed-union dKV consume the same on-chip score/prob/dP tile before returning to PyTorch autograd.
